0.q: the contents of seed total FAs and all major FA compositions were both significantly elevated in Col-0 35S:LuAccD–6HA plants compared to those in Col-0

2.q: The CDS sequence of the LuPP2C31 gene was ligated into the pGADT7 vector. The CDS sequence of the LuPYL1 gene was cloned into the pGBKT7 vector. The recombinant plasmids LuPP2C31-AD and LuPYL1-BD were co-transformed into yeast strain Y2HGold competent cells.

3.q: LuPLR1 sequence...with LuPLR2 gene (60.3% of sequence homology)

4.q: Functional characterization of LuCSD3 in transgenic Arabidopsis confirmed its role in enhancing salt tolerance through ROS homeostasis modulation.
